channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Forecasts Rainfall Across Several Counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued a weather warning for several parts of the country, indicating that heavy rainfall is expected over the next 24 hours. The highlands west and east ...

item.title: Meru MP Praises Son for Graduating from Duke University and Shares Words of Wisdom
item.description: Igembe North MP, Maore Maoka, proudly celebrated his son Edwin Mugambi Maore’s graduation from Duke University Pratt School of Engineering in the United States. In a heartfelt post on Facebook, the MP...

item.title: Limpopo authorities intensify efforts to locate missing two-year-old girl
item.description: Police in Limpopo have ramped up their search for Omphile Sethole, a two-year-old girl reportedly abducted from her home in Ga-Mabuela Village 10 days ago. The toddler's disappearance was first notice...

item.title: Tanzania increases TADB support for women and smallholder farmers
item.description: Tanzania has recently intensified its agricultural financing efforts through the Tanzania Agricultural Development Bank (TADB). The bank is focusing on empowering women and smallholder farmers by prov...

item.title: Severe Storms Flood Informal Settlements and Disrupt Infrastructure in Cape Town
item.description: Heavy rainfall, strong winds, thunderstorms, and even snowfall have caused widespread flooding across Cape Town and other provinces since 4 May 2026. According to Charlotte Powell, spokesperson for th...

item.title: Fortescue ordered to pay $150 million to Yindjibarndi after native title dispute
item.description: Fortescue Metals Group has been ordered by the Federal Court to pay $150.1 million in compensation to the Yindjibarndi people following a prolonged dispute over mining activities on their ancestral la...

item.title: Teen with Terminal Cancer Dies Shortly After Parents Are Released from Detention
item.description: Kevin Gonzalez, an 18-year-old battling stage 4 colon cancer, passed away just hours after an emotional reunion with his parents, who had been detained by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) ...

item.title: NDC announces prices and timetable for 2027 presidential and governorship forms
item.description: The Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) don announce how dem go dey sell forms, do screening, and hold primaries for 2027 elections. According to the party, anybody wey wan run for president go pay N60 ...

item.title: Apolipoprotein B Offers a More Accurate Measure of Cholesterol-Related Heart Risk
item.description: For decades, LDL cholesterol, often referred to as 'bad cholesterol,' has been the primary measure for assessing cardiovascular risk, guiding both clinical guidelines and widespread statin use. While ...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi Questions Transparency in Selection of Next CBI Director
item.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi has expressed strong concerns regarding the procedure adopted for selecting the next Chief of the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI). According to him, the process appe...

item.title: Ontario Promotes Toronto as Preferred Host for Defence, Security and Resilience Bank
item.description: The Ontario government, led by Premier Doug Ford, has actively campaigned for Toronto to host the upcoming Defence, Security and Resilience Bank (DSRB) headquarters. In a recently released booklet, th...

item.title: UN Chief Calls for More Climate Funding to Help Africa Tackle Climate Impacts
item.description: At the Africa Forward Summit in Nairobi, United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres highlighted that Africa is facing the worst impacts of the climate crisis despite contributing very little to...

item.title: Nigeria Confirmed to Host 2026 CAF Awards and CAF General Assembly
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don approve say Nigeria go host two major Confederation of African Football (CAF) events this year. According to the Nigeria Football Federation (NFF), the country go host ...

item.title: Vijay thanks Sudarsan Pattnaik for sand sculpture celebrating Tamil Nadu election win
item.description: On May 9, a day prior to taking oath as the Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu, C Joseph Vijay of the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) received a remarkable tribute from renowned sand artist Sudarsan Pattnaik...

item.title: Eurovision 2026: Semi-final line-up and updates from Vienna
item.description: The first semi-final of Eurovision 2026 is underway in Vienna, Austria, with Finland, Greece, and Israel among the countries vying for a place in the grand final. Israel's participation has sparked co...

item.title: Zanzibar urged to accelerate implementation of women empowerment project
item.description: The World Bank (WB) has called upon Zanzibar’s Ministry of Community Development, Gender, Elderly and Children to fast-track the implementation of the Tanzania Gender Equality Promotion Project (PAMOJ...

item.title: DP Kithure Kindiki Attends Museveni's Inauguration in Uganda
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki of Kenya has travelled to Kampala, Uganda, to witness the inauguration of Uganda's President-elect, Yoweri Kaguta Museveni. Museveni, who has been in power since 1986,...

item.title: Tanzania Inflation Hits 4% in April 2026 and Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange Sees Drop in Equity Turnover
item.description: During Week 17 of 2026, the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) faced a challenging trading week as total equity turnover declined to TZS 31.60 billion, down by -11.30% from the previous week. Bond tur...

item.title: Government Launches Long-Term Housing Project for Public Servants Across Tanzania
item.description: Dodoma — Tanzania government imeshaanza mpango wa muda mrefu wa kujenga nyumba kwa watumishi wa umma ili kupunguza uhaba wa makazi. Deputy Minister Dr Jafar Seif alikiri mbele ya Bunge kwamba mahitaji...

item.title: Ex-GOP strategist criticizes Trump for strengthening China's position ahead of visit
item.description: Ahead of President Donald Trump's visit to China from May 12-15, ex-GOP strategist Rick Wilson criticized Trump for actions he believes have inadvertently advanced China's strategic and economic ambit...
